name: STT Benchmark — Gold-92 Dataset Ingestion
description_short: Ingest, version, and register the gold-92 STT benchmark dataset.
description: Import the gold-92 benchmark dataset built from Rezolve production voice sessions (investor-relations domain, accented English). The dataset contains 93 WAV audio clips annotated with ground-truth transcripts, current production (Deepgram) transcriptions, and Whisper transcriptions. Audio files are tracked via DVC; JSONL annotation files are committed to git. This dataset is the primary regression test for all future STT experiments — it MUST NEVER be used for training or fine-tuning.
